docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,850.00 FILED BY LIANG, ZUKUN AS TO DEFENDANT REID, JIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0 SERVED JUN-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REID, JIM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ZUKUN LIANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JIM REID IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS REATAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, ZUKUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REID, JIM $960.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,010.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
